args.query: SELECT Id FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') AND CloseDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30' ORDER BY CloseDate DESC LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id FROM Opportunity WHERE REPLACE(ContactId, '#', '') = REPLACE('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR', '#', '') AND CloseDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30' ORDER BY CloseDate DESC LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId WHERE o.Id = '006Wt000007B0g2IAC' LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT oli.Product2Id FROM OpportunityLineItem oli JOIN Opportunity o ON o.Id = oli.OpportunityId WHERE o.Id = '006Wt000007B0g2IAC' LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT Id FROM Product2 WHERE REPLACE(Name, ' ', '') LIKE '%AIProcessingUnit%' AND Id IN (REPLACE('#01tWt000006hV8LIAU', '#', ''), REPLACE('01tWt000006hV9xIAE', '#', '')) LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id FROM Product2 WHERE REPLACE(Name, ' ', '') LIKE '%AIProcessingUnit%' AND Id IN (REPLACE('#01tWt000006hV8LIAU', '#', ''), REPLACE('01tWt000006hV9xIAE', '#', '')) LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT Id FROM Product2 WHERE (REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = REPLACE('#01tWt000006hV8LIAU', '#', '') OR REPLACE(Id, '#', '') = REPLACE('01tWt000006hV9xIAE', '#', '')) AND (LOWER(REPLACE(Name, ' ', '')) LIKE '%aiprocessing%' OR LOWER(REPLACE(Description, ' ', '')) LIKE '%aiprocessing%') LIMIT 1;
